You are welcome here.

Sundays at 11am · Wednesdays at 10:30am

See our meetings ↓
🗓️ Sunday 11am – 12:15pm
⏰ Midweek Wed 10:30am
🏠 In person 7 Struan Road
💻 Online Zoom & YouTube
🗓️

Sunday at 11

We meet together in the church and on Zoom every Sunday from 11:00am to 12:15pm. Our Sunday gathering is the heart of our week together. It is a time to worship God, explore the Bible, pray and sing. Whether you are joining us in person or online, you are warmly welcome.

After the service there is tea and coffee, and plenty of opportunity to chat and get to know each other. We are a friendly congregation and nobody need feel they are on their own.

💻

Join us online

We livestream every Sunday service on our YouTube channel. To join us on Zoom, please get in touch and we will send you the details.

—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
⏰

Midweek — Time for Reflection

Every Wednesday at 10:30am we gather in the church building for a quiet 40-minute reflective time together. This is a gentler, more contemplative gathering — a space to pause mid-week and reconnect with God.

Each session includes a Bible reading, a short talk and music. This gathering is in-person only, which adds to its intimate and unhurried character. All are welcome.

—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
📍
